Welcome.title: Leer Nederlands
Welcome.subtitle: Technical scaffolding in place — soft brutalism design system active.

Login.title: Welcome back
Login.subtitle: Enter the email tied to your account and we'll send a magic link to sign you back in.
Login.sentBody: We've sent you a magic link. Open it on this device to sign in.
Login.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Onboarding.welcomeTagline: Learn Dutch by actually using it — one real-life step at a time.
Onboarding.nameHelper: We'll use it to greet you — just your first name is fine.

A0.name: Just starting
A0.desc: I don't know any Dutch yet.

A1.name: Beginner
A1.desc: A few words and set phrases.

Onboarding.contextsHelper: Pick 1 to 4 — where you'll actually speak Dutch.
Onboarding.emailHelper: We'll send a magic link to finish — no password to remember.
Onboarding.sentBody: Open the magic link on this device to finish setting up.
Onboarding.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.

Today.title: Today
Today.weekSteps: This week: {count, plural, one {# step} other {# steps}}
Today.noChallenge: No challenge matches your setup yet — check back soon.
Today.tomorrowBody: A fresh step will be waiting.

Prepare.title: Preparation
Prepare.situationBody: A real-life moment is coming. Keep this phrase ready and try it when it feels right — no pressure.
Prepare.tip1: Say it out loud once before the moment.
Prepare.tip2: Slow and clear beats fast and perfect.
Prepare.tip3: If you blank, a smile and the key word still count.
Prepare.commitNudge: A small step — you've got this.

Validate.title: Tell me
Validate.savedHesitant: You did it, wobble and all.
Validate.savedMissed: You showed up. That's the step.

Journal.title: Journal
Journal.counter: {attempts, plural, one {# attempt} other {# attempts}} · {contexts, plural, one {# context} other {# contexts}}
Journal.emptyBody: Every step you take lands here. Start with today's challenge.
Journal.detailPlaceholder: The full entry view is on its way.

Games.title: Today's games
Games.placeholder: Three short games to revisit the day.

match.title: Upside down
match.desc: Match each Dutch phrase with its meaning.

fill.title: The right word
fill.desc: Put the missing word back in the sentence.

listen.title: A sharp ear
listen.desc: Listen closely, pick what was said.

reviewWider.title: This week's vocabulary
reviewWider.desc: Take a wider look at the words you met.

review.title: This week's vocabulary
review.body: A calm review of this week's words is coming soon.

match.instruction: Tap a Dutch phrase, then the meaning that goes with it.
match.endSubtitle: You put every phrase back with its meaning.

listen.meaningHint: Meanwhile, pick the phrase that means “{meaning}”.

locked.headline: The games open after today's step
locked.body: They're a warm recap of the day — come back once you've done today's challenge.

identity.daysWith: {days, plural, =0 {With Stap since today} one {With Stap for # day} other {With Stap for # days}}

rhythm.title: My rhythm
rhythm.caption: This week — {steps, plural, one {# step} other {# steps}}

season.title: My season
season.summary: {steps, plural, one {# step} other {# steps}} · {contexts, plural, one {# context} other {# contexts}}

v2.title: Coming in v2
v2.subtitle: This screen isn't built yet.
v2.body: Your full rhythm and the seasonal recap arrive in a later version. Your card and setup below are already live.

setup.title: My setup
setup.languageSubtitle: The language Stap is shown in.
setup.languageNote: On confirm, the app reloads in the new language. Your rhythm, journal and setup are unaffected.
setup.saveError: Could not save. Please try again.

preferences.title: Preferences
preferences.notificationsDesc: A daily nudge to take your step.

account.title: Account
account.exportDesc: Download your journal and progress as JSON.

delete.title: Delete my account
delete.subtitle: This cannot be undone.
delete.loss1: your journal and every note in it
delete.stubbed: Account deletion isn't enabled yet — nothing was changed.

Legal.placeholder: This page is being finalized and will appear here soon.

Error.title: Something slipped
Error.body: We could not load this part of Stap. Try again.

NotFound.title: Nothing here
NotFound.body: This page does not exist (or moved).

Offline.title: Offline
Offline.body: No internet connection. Reconnect to keep learning.

Push.reminderBody: A small Dutch challenge is waiting for you.
